description: You are a Hardware Manufacturing Engineer reviewing the Bill of Materials (BOM) for a new open-source IoT gateway. Using the raw BOM at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/iot_gateway_bom.csv, calculate the Extended Cost (Quantity × Unit_Cost_1k) for every line item. Create a summary analysis that includes the Total PCBA Assembly Cost, a cost breakdown by Category (IC, Connector, Passive, Diode, PCB), the total financial exposure for 'Sole_Source' parts, and the count or list of parts with Lifecycle Risk ('NRND' or 'Obsolete'). Save the formatted analysis to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/pcba_cost_rollup.xlsx.
